trans-unit.source: Call an MCP tool on a running resource
trans-unit.target: Call an MCP tool on a running resource

trans-unit.source: JSON input to pass to the tool
trans-unit.target: JSON input to pass to the tool

trans-unit.source: The name of the resource that exposes the MCP tool
trans-unit.target: The name of the resource that exposes the MCP tool

trans-unit.source: The name of the MCP tool to call
trans-unit.target: The name of the MCP tool to call

trans-unit.source: Warning: 'aspire mcp' commands are deprecated and will be removed in a future release. Please use 'aspire agent' instead.
trans-unit.target: Warnung: Die Befehle „aspire mcp“ sind veraltet und werden in einer zukünftigen Version entfernt. Bitte verwenden Sie stattdessen „aspire agent“.

trans-unit.source: Interact with MCP (Model Context Protocol) tools exposed by Aspire resources
trans-unit.target: Interact with MCP (Model Context Protocol) tools exposed by Aspire resources

trans-unit.source: Which additional options do you want to enable?
trans-unit.target: Welche zusätzlichen Optionen möchten Sie aktivieren?

trans-unit.source: Which agent environments do you want to configure?
trans-unit.target: Welche Agent-Umgebungen möchten Sie konfigurieren?

trans-unit.source: Agent environment configuration complete.
trans-unit.target: Die Konfiguration der Agentumgebung ist abgeschlossen.

trans-unit.source: Install Playwright CLI for browser automation?
trans-unit.target: Playwright-CLI für die Browserautomatisierung installieren?

trans-unit.source: Create agent environment specific instruction files?
trans-unit.target: Agentenspezifische Anweisungsdateien erstellen?

trans-unit.source: Initialize MCP server configuration for detected agent environments (deprecated, use 'agent init')
trans-unit.target: Initialize MCP server configuration for detected agent environments (deprecated, use 'agent init')

trans-unit.source: Detecting agent environments...
trans-unit.target: Agent-Umgebungen werden erkannt...

trans-unit.source: No agent environments were detected.
trans-unit.target: Es wurden keine Agentumgebungen gefunden.

trans-unit.source: Directory not found: {0}
trans-unit.target: Verzeichnis nicht gefunden: {0}

trans-unit.source: Enter the path to the root of your workspace:
trans-unit.target: Geben Sie den Stammpfad Ihres Arbeitsbereichs ein:

trans-unit.source: Workspace root path is required.
trans-unit.target: Der Stammpfad des Arbeitsbereichs ist erforderlich.

trans-unit.source: Start the MCP (Model Context Protocol) server (deprecated, use 'agent mcp')
trans-unit.target: Start the MCP (Model Context Protocol) server (deprecated, use 'agent mcp')

trans-unit.source: List MCP tools exposed by running resources
trans-unit.target: List MCP tools exposed by running resources

trans-unit.source: Output format (Table or Json)
trans-unit.target: Output format (Table or Json)
